arts.ttl: €80m-rated Hugo Ekitike expected to leave Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Hugo Ekitike (22) has re-built his career at Eintracht Frankfurt following a difficult spell at Paris Saint-Germain. This season, the Frenchman has already netted 18 goals in 34 games in…

arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitiké feels "better prepared" for next step than in the past
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt forward Hugo Ekitiké says he feels "better prepared" for a move to a top club now than he did when he moved to Paris Saint-Germain at a young age.
